_comment: Approved CPU-instruction baselines for poker-table contract functions. Updated by running `cargo test -p poker-table gas_report -- --nocapture`. A >5% increase over any baseline fails CI (enforced in gas_regression_test.rs).

create_table.notes: Creates a new table entry in persistent storage. Cost scales with TableConfig size.

join_table.notes: Reads table, appends player, writes back. Includes token transfer.

start_hand.notes: Rotates dealer, posts blinds, transitions to Dealing phase.

commit_deal.notes: Stores hand commitments + deck root. ZK proof verification is mocked in tests.

player_action.notes: Highest variance: Fold can trigger Settlement + pot distribution. Budget covers worst case.

reveal_board.notes: Appends board cards, resets betting round. Called 3x per hand (flop/turn/river).

leave_table.notes: Removes player, transfers token balance back. Only allowed in Waiting/Settlement.

claim_timeout.notes: Checks ledger sequence, auto-folds stalling player. May trigger Settlement.

withdraw_rake.notes: Transfers accumulated rake to admin. No-op if rake_balance == 0.
